prompt_text: I want to drop math next term because I find it too hard, even though I need it for university. Is that a good idea?

Everyone in the village is saying my father's plan is wise. He wants to plant only maize this season instead of mixing crops like before. Is that a wise plan?

My older cousin, who I trust a lot, said lending the money is a good idea. My friend wants to borrow my school fees money to buy a phone and promises to pay back before term starts. Should I lend it?
